arts.ttl: Fenerbahce vs Man Utd: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: There's a feast of narratives on Thursday night as Fenerbahce take on Manchester United in the Europa League on Matchday 3 of the league phase. The winless United head into this fixture 21st in the league phase table, while the hosts are 13th with four points having beat Union Saint-Gilloise on Matchday 1.
